reason: Successfully verified that agent can use GitHub tool to retrieve GitHub username after granting account access through interactive request card.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully with agent list visible in sidebar.
Located and clicked "QA-20260320-024131-1yps" agent in sidebar — Agent page opened showing agent name, idle status, and message input landing page.
Verified agent status is "idle" — Status indicator at top of page and in sidebar both showed "idle" status.
Sent message "Use the GitHub tool to check who I am. Tell me my GitHub username." — Message appeared in chat, agent status changed to "working", activity indicator showed "Working...".
Waited for agent response — Agent performed multiple tool calls including "Bash Check GitHub authentication status" and "Bash Check connected accounts env var".
GitHub account access request card appeared — Card showed "Access Requested: GitHub" with checkbox for connected GitHub account, "Grant Access" button (initially disabled), and "Decline" button.
Selected GitHub account checkbox — Checkbox became checked, "Grant Access" button became enabled and showed "Grant Access (1)".
Clicked "Grant Access" button — GitHub access was granted, agent status changed to "working" and resumed processing.
Waited for agent to complete response — Agent status changed back to "idle" after 35 seconds total.
Verified response includes GitHub username — Response displayed: "Your GitHub username is **yiw190**. You have a GitHub Pro plan with 3 public repos and 12 private repos, and 2FA enabled."
Took screenshot of final state — Full page screenshot captured showing complete conversation with GitHub username "yiw190" clearly visible in the response.
